name: Beef Brisket in Beer
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the fat from the brisket and place it in a 13- x 9- x 2-inch baking dish.
2. Sprinkle the top of the brisket with pepper and arrange onion rings over the brisket.
3. Combine chili sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and flour; stir well.
4. Pour the mixture over the brisket. Cover and bake at 350°F for 3 hours.
5. Uncover and bake an additional 20 minutes or until the brisket is tender.
6. Place the brisket on a serving platter and reserve the cooking liquid.
7. In a small saucepan, pour the reserved cooking liquid.
8. In a small bowl, mix flour with water using a wire whisk until smooth.
9. Gradually add the flour-water mixture to the cooking liquid in the saucepan, stirring constantly.
10. Bring the gravy to a boil and cook for 2 minutes or until thickened.
11. Serve the gravy with the brisket. Sprinkle with pepper and garnish with tomato slices and parsley if desired. (Serving size is 3 ounces of brisket and 3 tablespoons sauce).
